name: Chili Con Queso Dip
recipeIngredient: 16 ounces Pasteurized process cheese, spread - cut into cubes
1 tablespoon Hot chili peppers, finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the cheese cubes in the top of a double boiler over boiling water.
2. Stir constantly until the cheese is melted.
3. Stir in the chopped tomatoes and hot peppers until well blended and creamy.
4. Serve hot with tortilla or corn chips.
NOTE: The dip must be kept hot during serving to prevent excess thickening. A hot plate or chafing dish may be used. Makes 2-1/2 cups. Calories per 1 tablespoon serving: About 35.
